title: Whistle Blowers
description: Adds 6 different sound signals using keybinds, To ease mid-combat communicating. (no items required)(whistles, claps)
body:
### Have you ever tried fighting in co-op but had that one friend who can't avoid attacking their teammates?
Well... I have, and it a real pain.

Thats what this mod tries to solve, It allows you to bind 6 buttons in the controls screen, each one triggers a different sound.
On their own the sounds dont really have a meaning, ~~**except that one flirty whistle**~~, But the meaning is up to you and your teammates to decide, Thus your enemy won't understand your communications.

**Don't have a video for the sounds in-game yet, you can hear them from the "sound sources" menu below.**

It also has a 7th keybind which opens a... ~~not so~~ good looking menu where you choose a sound to play.
![Voice emotes menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a2a91b288c63302b870b677c232d57466ea0bfd.png)

# Q&A:
> _Do i need to craft an item to use the sounds?_

-No, just press a button and thats it.

> _Do you plan on porting this to fabric or older versions?_

-Idk, I will if enough people ask.

> _Can i use your mod in X modpack?_

-As long as you don't sell your modpack/product, you are free to use my mod (check the licence tho...)

> _Can I port your mod to older/newer versions?_

-You may port my mod to any other version and send a PR (pull request) through github, which you will be credited for, but you mustn't upload it outside this mod page unless explicitly stated.

> _Do you plan on updating this to the newer versions?_

-Yes

> _Why did you create this?_

-Playing with epic fight, my friend kills me on accident alot, i told him the enemy/boss chases me he attacks it, and we switch when one of us sends Y in chat, i get low try to send Y but die as i type, this idea hit me, "_why not make it so u just press Y and a signal is sent?_".

> _Why would this be usefull?_

-It's mostly made for people who cant use discord or calls. for example poor internet or potato pc.

-Imagine fighting a boss or enemy team, you agree with your team on 6 signals, **charge in, retreat, i am low, they have backup, self destruct(tnt), gather together**, your enemy won't know the meaning of each signal, they will just hear whistling everywhere, **WOULDN'T THAT BE COOL???.**


# Future plans:
- A way to destinguish who made the sound (may leave it for pvp strats (confuse your enemy)
- Add more sounds (suggestions are appreciated)
- Polish the voice emotes menu (maybe make it like bedrock emote menu)
- Implement importing custom sounds
- Add animations (may conflict with epic fight/better combat animations? _i may just disable it if they Are installed_)

# Known bugs:
- The gui button sounds in voice emote menu conflicts with the mod's sounds.

# Sound sources:
- [1st Whistle](https://freesound.org/people/dpsa/sounds/341594/)
- [2nd Whistle](https://freesound.org/people/Skiggz/sounds/256552/)
- [3rd Whistle](https://freesound.org/people/Mountain852/)
- [Flirty Whistle](https://freesound.org/people/OwlStorm/sounds/320150/)
- [clap](https://freesound.org/people/bogenseeberg/sounds/639139/)
- [Now](https://freesound.org/people/josiahsmith135/sounds/272410/)
